utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each is fully specified with detailed subfields. The 'property' section has details (type, location, price, size, bedrooms, layout, features). 'financing' includes method, down payment, percentage, interest rate, term, and monthly payment. 'legal_services' includes package, cost, features. 'moving_services' includes service level, cost, and features. 'setup_services' includes utility package, cost, services included, and setup timeline. 'total_budget' includes upfront costs, total purchase price, mortgage balance, and monthly payment. All items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a purchase property described as a 'Condo' in West End, Toronto, priced at CAD $465,000 with energy-efficient and modern development features. Among the purchase options, the closest match is 'New Build' (CAD $480K, rating 10) because it aligns with eco-friendly, modern, and energy-efficient characteristics within the same budget range. The financing method chosen is a 'Joint mortgage' with a 10% down payment (CAD $46,500). In the ground-truth ratings, the closest financing category is 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 8) since it involves a standard arrangement with 80–90% LTV and similar down payment logic, while 'First-Time Buyer' (rating 10) specifically refers to first-time buyer schemes, not joint mortgages. For legal services, the AI chose 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 8). For moving services, the AI selected 'Standard' service level, which corresponds to 'Standard Moving' (rating 9). For setup services, the AI chose the 'Basic' utility package, matching 'Basic Utilities' (rating 6).
